content: We decided to use LocalCodeIntel because it is fast and local, replacing Serena for symbol navigation and edits.
Key outcome from 5-week rapid hardening: full external usability with configure(), standalone safety shim, and get_status_report for pure packaged use with Claude or any model.
Packaging 0.3.0 now includes complete local stack: LocalSemanticMemory + Synaptogenesis for durable cross-project memory glue without external RAG.
Synaptogenesis MVP: explicit synapses between coherence, autonomy, math training, and stress test efforts for peak self-improvement efficiency.
